name: Customer Orders and Products Dataset
description: This dataset contains information about customers, their orders, and products. The customers table includes personal details such as names, emails, and addresses. The orders table records order details including order IDs, customer IDs, order dates, total amounts, and statuses. The products table lists product IDs, names, categories, prices, and stock quantities. The data is temporally covered on 2022-04-08 and spatially located at coordinates 21.277661, -104.690167.
